conclusion: The active native c2 512/128 gate has no generated-token mismatch: both rows match independent c1 for all 137 generated tokens (8 warmup + 128 measured + initial token accounting). The benchmark remains status=blocked only for retained/performance eligibility: projection dispatch falls back to row_gemv because no c-aware projection candidate evidence applies to rows=2, grouped-compact MoE is not selected in this current gate, primitive/profiler/baseline artifacts are not supplied, and no throughput claim is made. The next correctness milestone should therefore be c4/c8 equality under the current gate or a retained-dispatch evidence/code path, not another c2 mismatch hunt.
